values.report.truth_method: Human-reviewed reference transcribed from 240 DPI page renders. Whitespace and punctuation are normalized before CER/WER calculation.
values.report.scope_warning: The source is an invoice for a Thailand-to-Taiwan shipment, not a Thai import declaration. GDIM evaluation covers only values that can reasonably be derived from this invoice.
